query:
SELECT id, originalName, rowCount, colCount, createdAt,
       JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields')) as field_count
FROM sessions
WHERE originalName LIKE '%爱比爱尼%' OR originalName LIKE '%时皙%' OR originalName LIKE '%时暫%' OR originalName LIKE '%时哲%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UpQ6nzGwi5FMPrH.root --database CRyFQH5qGudysyWQuRqoNj --execute 
SELECT id, originalName, rowCount, colCount, createdAt,
       JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields')) as field_count
FROM sessions
WHERE originalName LIKE '%爱比爱尼%' OR originalName LIKE '%时皙%' OR originalName LIKE '%时暫%' OR originalName LIKE '%时哲%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
